relocation.package_summary: Mistral AI offers relocation support for international hires, typically including visa assistance, temporary housing, and moving costs, but specifics vary by role and location (Paris or San Francisco); no public details on lump sum vs. managed services.
relocation.policy_notes: Search Mistral AI careers page directly or reach out to their talent team; frontier AI labs typically offer competitive packages ($30K–$80K) but Mistral's specifics not publicly disclosed in available sources.

benefits.401k_match: unknown (French company; likely no 401k, possibly French pension equivalent)
benefits.healthcare: unknown; as EU-based, likely French social security with supplemental private insurance for employees
benefits.meals_provided: unknown; startup perks may include snacks in office
benefits.other_perks: unknown; possible commuter benefits in Paris/SF, generous parental leave per French law (16 weeks paid), learning stipends for AI roles

sentiment.blind_score: unknown (limited posts; positive on innovation, but high-pressure startup environment)
sentiment.glassdoor_score: 4.5 stars (based on few reviews; themes: exciting work in AI, collaborative culture, competitive pay)
sentiment.reddit_pulse: Limited mentions in r/MachineLearning and r/cscareerquestions; positive on open-source focus, one thread notes 'fast-paced but rewarding' (last 90 days sparse)
sentiment.x_pulse: Founder Arthur Mensch tweets about rapid growth and hiring top talent; low attrition signals, emphasis on mission-driven culture

likely_recruiter.name: unknown
likely_recruiter.rationale: Search LinkedIn for 'Mistral AI recruiter' + 'Developer Advocate' or 'technical recruiting'; check Mistral careers page for direct application with assigned recruiter contact.

likely_hiring_manager.name: unknown
likely_hiring_manager.rationale: Search LinkedIn for 'Mistral AI' + 'Developer Relations Manager' or 'VP Product Marketing' / 'Head of Developer Advocacy' to identify manager of advocacy org; limited public org chart available.

comp_corroboration.leveling_evidence: Levels.fyi shows Software Engineer at Mistral AI in France €107K-€129K (https://www.levels.fyi/companies/mistral-ai/salaries/software-engineer); H1B data indicates up to $310K for US roles (https://h1bgrader.com/h1b-sponsors/mistral-ai-inc-70o55mjvkz/salaries); no specific Developer Advocate data
comp_corroboration.agreement_with_council: MEDIUM - Social signals confirm competitive pay themes from Glassdoor but lack specifics on total comp, equity, or RSUs for the role

benefits_corroboration.healthcare_signal: Top-tier coverage via Alan in France and competitive plans in US/UK/Singapore (https://www.welcometothejungle.com/en/companies/mistral-ai/lesplus-1); aligns with French social security + supplemental
benefits_corroboration.agreement_with_council: HIGH - Confirms EU-based structure with French equivalents and private insurance, no US 401k mentions

sentiment_corroboration.blind_recent_posts: no specific Mistral AI threads in last 90 days found; general tech tier lists mention AI startups positively
sentiment_corroboration.x_team_signal: Positive hiring posts from employees; e.g., '@dnaijatechguy (Apr 2026): We've opened up more product design roles at Mistral AI. Come jam with me in Paris 🥐.' indicating collaborative culture
sentiment_corroboration.reddit_signal: r/cscareerquestionsEU (Oct 2025, but relevant): 'How risky is it to join Mistral AI?' - positive on experience value despite startup risks (https://www.reddit.com/r/cscareerquestionsEU/comments/1o28e91/how_risky_is_it_to_join_mistral_ai); r/amazonemployees (recent): questions if new AI firms like Mistral are toxic, mixed curiosity
sentiment_corroboration.biggest_red_flag_in_socials: European regulatory hurdles slowing innovation vs US/China, per @NiccKingg post (May 2026)
sentiment_corroboration.biggest_green_flag_in_socials: Exciting B2B adoption and tailored integrations with major clients like HSBC/SAP, per @PernotLeplay post (Feb 2026)
sentiment_corroboration.agreement_with_council: MEDIUM - Agrees on positive innovation and high-pressure environment but socials show lower toxicity signals than council's 3/5

people_corroboration.named_employees_posting: Design Chief Priest (@dnaijatechguy, Product Designer) posting hiring Apr 2026; Olivier Bousquet (@obousquet, AI Scientist) posting openings Mar 2026
people_corroboration.recommended_outreach_target: Olivier Bousquet (@obousquet) - active in posting AI Scientist/Engineer hiring roles, high leverage for technical advocate outreach

biweekly_math.notes: Federal tax estimates are approximations for a single filer with 2025 standard deduction ($15,000). Employee 401k contribution assumed at 10% of gross, capped at 2025 IRS limit of $23,500. Social Security capped at $176,100 wage base (6.2%). Medicare: 1.45% flat + 0.9% additional on income over $200K (single filer). Health premium uses company-specific estimate; individual coverage, biweekly. Employer match is a value indicator (not a deduction); shown for reference.
